other_observers: 1/4 - Nick Komar 1/11 - Joey Kellner, Brandon Percival, Joe Roller, Dick Schottler, and Loch Kilpatrick;
description: White wing tips, white body, white head. Has some light brown markings on the body and has some smudgy gray on the head. Mostly white belly and chest, but it still had some smudgy light gray colors. Light brown and white lines on the undertail coverts. Dark eye. Pink legs. A little over half of the bill was pink, mostly the base of the bill. It also had a small pink tip to the bill. The pink on the bill was still quite dark.Behaviors: Mostly sitting on the ice, but occasionally would fly around and occasionally sit on the water.Call: Didn't knowingly hear itPlumage: 1st Winter
